book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the east and should be in the type of guesthouse
The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should have a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 4 nights starting from friday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel and should serve italian food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for the same group of people at 15:00 on the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
